scripts.dev: npm run db:start && npm run db:migrate:local && npm run build:workers --workspace=web && concurrently -k -n web,send-email,fake-resend -c blue,magenta,yellow "npm run preview:workers --workspace=web" "npm run dev --workspace=send-email -- --port 8788" "npm run dev:fake-resend --workspace=e2e"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=web && npm run typecheck --workspace=send-email && npm run typecheck --workspace=e2e
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:integration: npm run db:start && npm run db:reset && npm run db:migrate:local && npm run test:e2e && npm run db:stop
